overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene showing a player walking through a dark forest at night toward an illuminated stone crypt. The atmosphere is moody with stormy clouds overhead, and the player approaches the entrance where an interaction prompt appears.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy forest clearing approaching stone crypt

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grassy clearing toward the stone crypt visible in the distance

entered.detail: domed stone mausoleum with warm light glowing from the entrance
tall pine trees lining the left side of the clearing
tall pine trees lining the right side
warm lights marking the winding path through the grass

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dark forest clearing at night, approaching a distant stone crypt with a domed roof. Evergreen trees line both sides of the grassy path, while warm lanterns mark the route ahead. Storm clouds drift across the night sky as the crypt grows slowly larger in the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone crypt entrance with illuminated doorway

events.description: game UI interaction prompt 'Enter the Old Crypt' appears at bottom left of screen

agents.ego_description: approaching the crypt entrance steps, looking up at the stone doorway as the interaction prompt appears

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the crypt entrance platform
large arched wooden doorway with stone frame
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm light on the stone facade

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the stone steps of the crypt as the building fills the frame. The camera tilts upward to reveal the arched wooden doorway and a lit wall lantern. At 21 seconds, a game prompt appears offering to enter the crypt, while the stormy sky remains visible above the domed structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark forest that culminates in the arrival at a looming stone crypt. It begins in a clearing, moving along a grassy path lined with evergreen trees and warm lanterns while storm clouds drift across the night sky. As the camera advances, the distant domed roof of the crypt gradually grows larger and more dominant in the center of the frame. The scene then shifts as the player reaches the stone steps, with the camera tilting upward to reveal an arched wooden doorway and a lit wall lantern. Finally, the view settles on the entrance as a game prompt appears, offering entry into the structure beneath the swirling stormy sky.
